_meta.description: Starter golden set for engram-eval. Each query is paired with the memory IDs that should appear in the top-K recall. Add more rows as your test corpus grows.

schema.query: string — the user-facing query string passed to memory_recall
schema.project: string — project slug to recall from
schema.relevant_ids: string[] — memory IDs that MUST appear in the top-K to count as a hit
schema.top_k: int — how many results to fetch (default 10)

_meta.regenerate: Populate by recalling a representative query in production, capturing the top-K IDs, and adding them as the expected set. Closes #684.

queries.query: what did we decide about JWT signing
